array_of_cc_recipients_recipientid_name_: Array of CC recipients (recipientId, name, email, status)

combined_for_all_docs_or_specific_docume: "combined" for all docs, or specific document ID
create_and_send_envelopes_for_e_signatur: Create and send envelopes for e-signature, use templates, check signing status, download signed documents, and manage recipients with DocuSign.
envelope_status_created_sent_delivered_c: Envelope status (created, sent, delivered, completed, declined, voided)
